item.name: health-check-results-api APIM proxy (called from the lab)

item.name: MTLS /results direct call to our endpoint
MTLS /_status direct call to our endpoint (healthcheck)
/health-checks/{id} - get patient health check by id
/health-checks/{id}/version - update health check version to the latest release
/health-checks/{id}/schedule-gp-update - schedule GP update for health check with id
/health-checks/{id}/blood-test - update health check lab order details

exec: console.error('Missing applicationId or apiKey environment variables.');
throw new Error('Missing required environment variables.');

body.raw:
<soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/">
  <soap:Header>
    <MessageID xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2005/08/addressing">53B98379-99CD-4E48-89C6-C02CD96ECC86</MessageID>
    <Action xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2005/08/addressing">emis:transactionim:records:req_GetActiveUsers_V1_0</Action>
    <To xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2005/08/addressing">http://3.11.93.54/ITK</To>
    <From xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2005/08/addressing">http://127.0.0.1:4848/syncsoap/</From>
    <ReplyTo xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2005/08/addressing">
      <Address>http://www.w3.org/2005/08/addressing/anonymous</Address>
    </ReplyTo>
  </soap:Header>
  <soap:Body>
    <itk:DistributionEnvelope xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:itk="urn:nhs-itk:ns:201005">
      <itk:header trackingid="4092F938-3B0D-4A4B-BA02-DC3C65DCE968" service="emis:transactionim:records:req_GetActiveUsers_V1_0">
        <itk:addresslist>
          <itk:address uri="urn:nhs-uk:addressing:ods:A28579" />
        </itk:addresslist>
        <itk:auditIdentity>
          <itk:id uri="emisweb" />
        </itk:auditIdentity>
        <itk:manifest count="1">
          <itk:manifestitem id="uuid_E808A967-49B2-498B-AD75-1D7A0F1262D7" mimetype="application/xml" />
        </itk:manifest>
        <itk:senderAddress uri="urn:nhs-uk:addressing:ods:A28579" />
        <itk:handlingSpecification>
          <itk:spec key="emis:BinarySecurityToken" value="" />
          <itk:spec key="emis:MessageDigest" value="" />
          <itk:spec key="emis:Signature" value="" />
        </itk:handlingSpecification>
      </itk:header>
      <itk:payloads count="1">
        <itk:payload id="uuid_E808A967-49B2-498B-AD75-1D7A0F1262D7">
          <EWDS xmlns="urn:nhs-itk:ns:201005">
            <RequestHeader>
              <ExternalUserName>DNHSHC_A1234</ExternalUserName>
              <MachineName>O_o</MachineName>
            </RequestHeader>
            <RequestBody>
              <RequestMethod>
                <MethodDefinition>
                  <Name>Emis.Interop.PatientAPI.GetActiveUsers</Name>
                  <Version>1.0.0.0</Version>
                </MethodDefinition>
                <Content>
                  <PatientAPI>
                    <SmartCardTokenId></SmartCardTokenId>
                  </PatientAPI>
                </Content>
              </RequestMethod>
            </RequestBody>
          </EWDS>
        </itk:payload>
      </itk:payloads>
    </itk:DistributionEnvelope>
  </soap:Body>
</soap:Envelope>
